requirement_topic.en: KEPCO Grid-Connection Requirements for BESS / PCS

summary.en: BESS projects connecting to the Korean grid must satisfy KEPCO interconnection review and applicable Korean grid-code requirements for the PCS, protection, metering, anti-islanding, power quality, communication, and commissioning. Requirements may vary by voltage level, project size, distribution or transmission connection point, and whether the system participates in market or renewable-integration programs.
summary.zh: 接入韩国电网的BESS项目须满足KEPCO并网审查及适用韩国电网规范，对PCS、保护、计量、防孤岛、电能质量、通信和调试提出要求。要求可能随电压等级、项目规模、配电或输电接入点，以及系统是否参与电力市场或新能源并网项目而变化。
summary.zht: 接入韓國電網的BESS項目須滿足KEPCO併網審查及適用韓國電網規範，對PCS、保護、計量、防孤島、電能品質、通信和調試提出要求。要求可能隨電壓等級、項目規模、配電或輸電接入點，以及系統是否參與電力市場或新能源併網項目而變化。

standards_or_laws: KEPCO interconnection and distribution / transmission connection requirements
Korean grid-code requirements for energy storage PCS
Project-specific commissioning and utility acceptance requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 34120-2023 for electrochemical storage PCS technical requirements, GB/T 36558-2023 for system-level grid-connected ESS requirements, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid enterprise rules. These Chinese grid documents do not substitute for KEPCO review.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 34120-2023作为电化学储能PCS技术要求，GB/T 36558-2023作为并网储能系统级要求，并适用国家电网或南方电网企业规则。这些中国并网文件不能替代KEPCO审查。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 34120-2023作為電化學儲能PCS技術要求，GB/T 36558-2023作為併網儲能系統級要求，並適用國家電網或南方電網企業規則。這些中國併網文件不能替代KEPCO審查。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project rules

gap.en: Chinese PCS type-test reports must be mapped to KEPCO settings and Korean grid-code parameters. Exporters should prepare Korean-language PCS test evidence, relay and protection settings, ride-through and anti-islanding data, communication protocol evidence, metering design, single-line diagrams, and commissioning procedures for the Korean project owner and KEPCO review.
gap.zh: 中国PCS型式试验报告须映射至KEPCO设定和韩国电网规范参数。出口商应准备韩文PCS测试证据、继电保护和保护定值、穿越和防孤岛数据、通信协议证据、计量设计、单线图和调试程序，供韩国项目业主及KEPCO审查。
gap.zht: 中國PCS型式試驗報告須映射至KEPCO設定和韓國電網規範參數。出口商應準備韓文PCS測試證據、繼電保護和保護定值、穿越和防孤島數據、通信協議證據、計量設計、單線圖和調試程序，供韓國項目業主及KEPCO審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection — KEPCO and applicable grid-code approval is required before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid connection where State Grid / Southern Grid project requirements apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 34120 or GB/T 36558 evidence does not itself clear Korean grid connection. KEPCO project review and Korean grid-code parameter compliance are required before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 34120或GB/T 36558证据本身不能完成韩国并网。送电前须通过KEPCO项目审查并满足韩国电网规范参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 34120或GB/T 36558證據本身不能完成韓國併網。送電前須通過KEPCO項目審查並滿足韓國電網規範參數。
